scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,admin,mobile" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client-admin" "npm run dev --prefix client-mobile"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client-admin && npm run build --prefix client-mobile
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client-admin && npm install --prefix client-mobile
